t_ch: 只有你教才让人放心，对吧？
t_en: You're the only one we can trust to teach, right?

t_ch: 呜嗡！（嗯！）
t_en: Grumph! (Yep!)

t_ch: 一向不敬泰坦的那刻夏老师居然会推荐用神迹疗法…这大概真是最好的选择了。
t_en: If even Professor Anaxa, who's never shown respect for the Titans, is recommending miracle therapy... Then it must really be the best option.

t_ch: 加油！如果有什么需要帮忙的地方，就来昏光庭院找我吧。
t_en: You can do it! If you need any help, just come find me at the Twilight Courtyard.

t_ch: 《小小一只大地兽》，全剧终…？
t_en: The Tiny Little Dromas, The End...?

t_ch: 拜托了，{TEXTJOIN#247}，如果掉在地上的蜜饼能复原的话……
t_en: Please, {TEXTJOIN#247}. If honey cakes that fell on the ground can be fixed...

t_ch: 别说话，正是关键时刻。
t_en: Silence, please. This is a critical moment.

t_ch: 抱歉，我太投入了…（小声）拜托了，{TEXTJOIN#247}。
t_en: Sorry, I got carried away... *whispers* Please, {TEXTJOIN#247}.

t_ch: 记得分我一半。
t_en: I get half of that cake, right?

t_ch: 原来灰宝在惦记这个吗…好啊，就当是报酬了。
t_en: So that's what you're after... Sure, we got a deal.

t_ch: 风堇她什么都愿意做的！
t_en: Hyacine is willing to do anything!

t_ch: 我、我可没有那么说！
t_en: I—I never said that!

t_ch: 呜嗡——（完成——）
t_en: Grumph... (All done...)

t_ch: 好厉害…要是蒙上眼睛的话，我肯定分不出是你们谁用的祷言。
t_en: Amazing... If I covered my eyes, I definitely wouldn't be able to tell which one of you used the prayer.

t_ch: 我都没这么熟练。
t_en: Even I'm not that skilled.

t_ch: 做得好，{TEXTJOIN#247}。
t_en: Well done, {TEXTJOIN#247}.

t_ch: 嗡，呜呜呜嗡！（嘿嘿，我的成果就是{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}的成果！反之亦然！）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhhh! (Hehe, my success is {F#Mama}{M#Papa}'s success! And vice versa!)

t_ch: 呼呼，哼哼哈哈哈哈哈哈——
t_en: Hehe, hehehe... Hahahahaha —

t_ch: 我早就断言，大地兽的潜能是无限的！敬拜学派的那些顽固学究也该心服口服了！
t_en: I knew it! I've always said the potential of dromas is limitless! Those stubborn Venerationist scholars will have to eat their words now!

t_ch: 敬拜学派和大地兽有关吗？
t_en: Does Venerationism have anything to do with dromas?

t_ch: 否，只是我的论文《论大地兽取代渎职祭司的可行性》被他们联名批判了而已。
t_en: No. They just collectively criticized my paper On the Feasibility of Replacing Negligent Priests with Dromas.

t_ch: 不愧是华服大地兽。
t_en: As expected of the "dromas draped in finery."

t_ch: 呵，我就当作这是你的夸奖了。
t_en: Heh, I'll take that as a compliment.

t_ch: 总之，照这样下去，它很快就能掌握欧洛尼斯的权能。不敢想象它最终会成长到何种地步。
t_en: Anyway, at this rate, it'll master the power of Oronyx in no time. I can't even imagine how far it might go from there.

t_ch: 加油，{TEXTJOIN#247}！
t_en: Keep going, {TEXTJOIN#247}!

t_ch: 在想什么呢？
t_en: Thinking hard over there?

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡……（呜，我的欧洛尼斯之力…在奔涌……）
t_en: Grumph, grumph... (Ugh, my Oronyx power... is surging...)

t_ch: *嚼嚼*…嗯？蜜饼怎么变成麦粉和水啦？！哇——
t_en: Nomnom... Huh? Why did my honey cake turn into flour and water!? Waaah —

t_ch: 等等，别再回溯啦——
t_en: Wait, stop rewinding —

t_ch: 这就已经中学二年级了？
t_en: Huh? The rebellious phase already?

t_ch: 太优秀了，它果然前途无量……
t_en: Incredible. This one's going places...

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}最近总是出岔子，不止一位街坊邻居向你反映——它在看店时把小海豹当成小海豹玩偶卖，很难说是故意的还是有意的。
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247} keeps making mistakes lately. Several neighbors have complained — it sold actual baby seals as stuffed toys while managing the shop. Hard to tell if it was an honest mistake or intentional.

t_ch: 子不教，家长之过。眼下它或许是过度劳累，腰腿酸痛，精神不振，好像身体被掏空……
t_en: Parents must answer for their children's mistakes. Though right now the poor thing looks worn out. Sore limbs, zero energy... It looks completely exhausted...

t_ch: 作为家长，是时候拉它一把了。
t_en: And as the parent, I should step in and help.

t_ch: 要不要出去玩一玩？
t_en: How about we go out and have some fun?

t_ch: 好久没洗澡了，帮我搓背吧。
t_en: I'm way overdue for a bath. Care to help scrub my back?

t_ch: 呜嗡？（嗯嗯？）
t_en: Grumph? (Excuse me?)

t_ch: 云石天宫，翁法罗斯的清汤锅底。形形色色的人们来到这里，希望能让水流冲走自己的烦恼，就像焯水。
t_en: Marmoreal Palace is Amphoreus's melting pot. All manner of people come here, hoping that the waters will wash away their worries, just as meat is stripped of its scent by boiling soup.

t_ch: 正如某著名先哲说过的那样：「我没有说过这句话，但你可以往里填入任何喜欢的词，开心就好。」
t_en: As a wise person may or may not have said: "I never said this, but feel free to imagine I said whatever makes you happy."

t_ch: 可惜现在，你看不出{TEXTJOIN#247}到底开不开心。
t_en: Too bad you can't tell if {TEXTJOIN#247} is happy right now.

t_ch: 你最近似乎有心事？
t_en: Got something on your mind?

t_ch: 呜…（唔…心事，心事啊……）
t_en: Grumph... (Yeah... some-thing...)

t_ch: 来比比谁在高温浴池里泡得久？
t_en: Bet I can outlast you in the hot bath!

t_ch: 呜嗡…（不要啦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你又不是大地兽，煮熟了怎么办。）
t_en: Grumph... (Nuh-uh, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Unlike me, you could actually get cooked.)

t_ch: 谁欺负你了吗？
t_en: Has anyone been picking on you?

t_ch: 呜嗡~（才没有呢，从来都是我欺负别人~）
t_en: Grumph~ (Not at all! I'm usually the one doing the picking!)
Grumph... (...)

t_ch: 呜…（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我想问，你…害怕失败吗？）
t_en: Grumph... ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, can I ask you something? Do you ever fear failure?)

t_ch: 从来没有怕过。
t_en: Never have, never will.

t_ch: 呜…（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}真的好厉害啊……）
t_en: Grumph... ({F#Mama}{M#Papa} is so amazing...)

t_ch: 当然会害怕。
t_en: Absolutely.

t_ch: 呜…（原来{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也一样啊……）
t_en: Grumph... (So even {F#Mama}{M#Papa} feels that way...)

t_ch: 一直在失败，习惯了。
t_en: Failures are normal. I got used to it.

t_ch: 呜…（唔…拍拍{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}……）
t_en: Grumph... (Aww... there there, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}...)

t_ch: 呜…（我好像想明白了一些东西，又好像没有……）
t_en: Ugh... (I feel like I figured something out, but maybe not...)

t_ch: 为什么要问这个问题呢？
t_en: Why are you asking that question?

t_ch: …呜嗡~（…是在考虑获奖感言的事啦，别在意，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}~）
t_en: ...Grumph~ (...Just thinking about my award acceptance speech. Don't mind me, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}~)

t_ch: 话题转得略显生硬，看来，想要解开{TEXTJOIN#247}的秘密，还需要一段时间。
t_en: Bit of an abrupt topic shift there. Looks like it'll take more time to unravel the mystery of {TEXTJOIN#247}.

t_ch: …好吧，之后还是由你来转述。
t_en: ...Alright. I'll let you do the translating from here.

t_ch: 相信应该你已经知道，这头大地兽…并非生来就超凡脱俗。但它拥有无限的潜力。
t_en: As you probably already know, this dromas... wasn't born extraordinary, but it possesses limitless potential.

t_ch: 只要有人细心呵护，它一定能成长到其他大地兽所不能及的高度——这项崇高的使命就交给你了。
t_en: With proper care and nurturing, it can grow to heights that other dromases could never reach. That noble task... now rests with you.

t_ch: 如果遇到什么问题，记得随时向我求问——再见，小家伙，祝你平安。
t_en: If anything comes up, don't hesitate to ask me. Farewell, little one, and stay safe.

t_ch: 他对你寄予厚望。
t_en: He has high hopes for you.

t_ch: 呜嗡。（有枪的老师，说什么都是对的。）
t_en: Grumph. (Teachers with guns are always right.)

t_ch: 你对他有何评价？
t_en: What's your take on him?

t_ch: 呜…嗡？（很温柔，但他为什么对着空气说话？难道他也有幻想朋友吗？）
t_en: Grumph... Grumph? (Very gentle... but why does he keep talking to the air? Could he have an imaginary friend too?)

t_ch: 好离谱的翻译器。
t_en: What a ridiculous translator.

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡…（偷偷告诉你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，其实也不算错…）
t_en: Grumph... (Just between us, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, that wasn't exactly wrong...)

t_ch: 不知等{TEXTJOIN#247}成长为完全体的那天，那刻夏会是什么表情。
t_en: You wonder what expression Anaxa will have when {TEXTJOIN#247} reaches its ultimate form.

t_ch: 准时赴约，合格。接下来，让我见识小家伙的能耐吧——掌握欧洛尼斯祷言的大地兽，这毫无疑问是足以写入史册的成就。
t_en: Punctual as agreed. Acceptable. Now then, let me see what you're capable of, little one. A dromas that has mastered Oronyx's Prayer... This is undoubtedly an achievement worthy of the history books.

t_ch: 且慢，请给我们留个观众席。
t_en: Wait, please make sure to leave us a seat in the audience.

t_ch: …兽王，什么风把你给吹来了？
t_en: ...What brings you here, Beast King?

t_ch: 呃…你知道的，有大地兽的地方就有我——这点咱俩谁也别说谁。
t_en: Uh... you know, wherever there is dromas, I'll be there. We're both guilty of that one.

t_ch: 我这次来，是为了给旅团物色新成员，也是为了让这孩子见见优秀的前辈——
t_en: I'm here to scout new blood for the troupe, and also to let this kid meet some proper role models —

t_ch: 呜嗡~
t_en: Grumph~

t_ch: 这头大地兽名为「贝茜摩丝」，领受过吉奥里亚的祝福，可以与其他大地兽共享感官。通过它的双眼，整个旅团都能目睹{TEXTJOIN#247}的表现。
t_en: This dromas, named "Behemoth," has received the blessing of Georios and can share its senses with other dromases. Through its eyes, the entire troupe can witness {TEXTJOIN#247}'s performance.

t_ch: 这下成现场直播了。
t_en: And now we're live-streaming.

t_ch: 看来阁下平时没少刷{RUBY_B#手机}石版{RUBY_E#}。不瞒你说，大地兽们的一部分伙食就是来自直播投喂。
t_en: Seems like someone's been living on the {RUBY_B#phone}slate{RUBY_E#} too much. Not gonna lie, some of our dromases' meals actually come from livestream donations.

t_ch: 这次直播过后，{TEXTJOIN#247}的粉丝想必会多到能占领大地兽工坊吧。
t_en: After this livestream, {TEXTJOIN#247}'s army of fans could probably take over the Dromas Workshop.

t_ch: 吉奥里亚祝福还有这功效？
t_en: Georios's Blessings can do that, too?

t_ch: 啊呀，阁下该不会是担心被大地兽看到什么秘密吧？别担心，它们不会往外说的，就算说了也没人听得懂。
t_en: Oh? Worried the dromas might see some little secrets? Don't worry, they won't tell anyone — and even if they did, nobody would understand them anyway.

t_ch: 吉奥里亚都没了还能发祝福？
t_en: Can Georios send blessings even when they are gone?

t_ch: 大地兽毕竟是吉奥里亚最为独特的造物，领受最多的宠爱也是理所当然的吧——听说「大地的半神」就是大地兽啊！
t_en: After all, dromases are Georios's most unique creation. So it's only natural these creatures receive the most love. I heard that the demigod of Earth is actually a dromas!

t_ch: 好了，闲话少叙。成大事者不应畏惧被审视。{TEXTJOIN#247}，我们开始吧。
t_en: Alright, enough chatter. Those destined for greatness should not fear scrutiny. {TEXTJOIN#247}, let's begin.

t_ch: 当然，不然我如何与旅团的那么多只大地兽相处？看来，这只幼兽是我兽友生涯的一大挑战……
t_en: Of course, how else could I get along with so many dromases in the troupe? Though... this little one might just be a tough challenge in my beast-friend career.

t_ch: 呵，你成功引起了我的兴趣！
t_en: Heh, now you've piqued my interest!

t_ch: 没事，我可以翻译。
t_en: No worries. I can do the translation.

t_ch: 哦哦哦哦哦——你居然、居然可以和我沟通不了的大地兽沟通？
t_en: WHOOOA... You can actually talk to the dromas I can't!?

t_ch: 一天之内连续遭受两次打击，真是太爽了！人生就该充满惊喜！
t_en: Two hits in one day? Oh, just peachy! Life should be full of surprises like this!

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这人好奇怪啊。还好他不是大地兽，不然太丢兽啦。）
t_en: Grumphhhh. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, this person is so weird. Good thing he's not a dromas. What an embarrassment that'd be.)

t_ch: 咳咳…总之，我很看好它。等几周后大部队回来，我们详细聊聊吧。
t_en: Ahem... Anyway, I've got a good feeling about this one. Let's talk more about it in detail when the main forces return in a few weeks.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（我懂的，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这时候我该说点撑场面的话……）
t_en: Grumph... (I get it. {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, now's the time for me to say some impressive words...)

t_ch: 呜嗡！（只要再长大一些，我就能走上兽生巅峰，成为大地兽中的大地兽啦！
t_en: Grumph! (Just wait until I grow up a bit more. I'll rise to the very top of the beast world and become the dromas among dromases! Just you wait!)

t_ch: 多年后，奥赫玛城中出现了一只无比成功的大地兽。
t_en: Years later, an incredibly successful dromas appears in the city of Okhema.

t_ch: 它的身后跟着追随者无数，它的餐桌上堆满最高等的红土，它的头像甚至被刻在硬币上……
t_en: This dromas has countless followers in its wake, its table piled high with the finest redsoil, its face even minted on coins...

t_ch: 人们都说，它的兽生已经抵达了巅峰，但它仍没有停止前进。或许只有它自己知道，大地兽的终点在何方……
t_en: People say it has attained life's zenith, yet the dromas never stopped. Perhaps only the dromas itself knows where its final destination lies...

t_ch: 精妙！这手法，比我认识的欧洛尼斯祭司还要专业！简直叹为观止啊！
t_en: Brilliant! Such a technique even outclasses the Oronyx priests I know! Utterly breathtaking!

t_ch: 事不宜迟，大地兽之友·{NICKNAME}阁下，我正式代表旅团向它发出邀请。
t_en: Without further ado, {NICKNAME} "Friend of Dromas," I formally extend an invitation on behalf of the troupe.

t_ch: 哼，凭{TEXTJOIN#247}的实力，别说加入旅团，就是让它接任下一任团长都不成问题……
t_en: Hmph. With {TEXTJOIN#247}'s abilities, forget just joining the troupe. It could outright lead it...

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡……
t_en: Grumph, grumph...

t_ch: 正巧，来任务了。小家伙，想不想跟我们一起出任务？这次的救援，如果能有你辅助，肯定会顺利许多。
t_en: Perfect timing. We've got a mission. Little one, want to come along? With your support on this rescue, things would definitely go a lot smoother.
Grumph... (I...)

t_ch: 我家孩子真棒！
t_en: That's my kid!

t_ch: 它好像有些为难的样子…
t_en: It seems a bit troubled...

t_ch: 怎么了，孩儿？
t_en: What's wrong, kid?

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡……（我的…欧洛尼斯之力…要控制不住了……）
t_en: Grumph, grumph... (My... power of Oronyx... is getting out of control...)

t_ch: 它用迅雷不及掩耳的速度窜了出去，顺道撞碎一个飞天坛递，获得了超级加速。
t_en: It shot out at lightning speed, smashing a Flying Amphora along the way and gaining a super speed boost.

t_ch: 它…为什么突然变得那么大？
t_en: Why did it... suddenly grow so huge?

t_ch: 之前就有迹象了。
t_en: There were signs earlier.

t_ch: 原来不是中二病啊…
t_en: Oh, so it's not the rebellious phase after all...

t_ch: 我去找它。
t_en: I'll go find it.

t_ch: 需要我帮忙吗？
t_en: Do you need any help?

t_ch: 没关系，我大概知道它会去哪。
t_en: No worries. I have a pretty good idea where it's headed.

t_ch: 这是家长的任务。
t_en: This is a parent's mission.

t_ch: 嗯，的确。交给你了。
t_en: Hmm, indeed. I'll leave it to you.

t_ch: 许多年后，人类终于回想起了，被大地兽支配的恐怖。
t_en: Many years later, humanity finally recalled the terror of being dominated by dromases.

t_ch: 神功已然大成的{TEXTJOIN#247}微微张嘴，磅礴的岁月之力便从它口中喷出。被那光束扫到的人们惊讶地发现，自己竟然重返了青春！
t_en: Having achieved perfect transcendence, {TEXTJOIN#247} opened its mouth slightly, releasing an invincible power of time. Those caught in the beam were stunned to find themselves young again!

t_ch: 从那时起，崇拜大地兽的教团便在奥赫玛城各个角落悄然建立。而一头大地兽究竟为何拥有此等力量，学者们议论纷纷……
t_en: Since then, cults devoted to dromases quietly sprang up across every corner of Okhema city. As for why such a creature wielded power so great, scholars still argue to this day...

t_ch: 随着他们聊得越来越热络，你像之前那样，进入了对未来的美好畅想中——
t_en: As their conversation grew more animated, you drifted into pleasant daydreams about the future, just like before—

t_ch: 你对之前的幻想情境做了改进，现在更酷更拽了。真期待那天的到来。
t_en: This time, the scenario you imagined was even cooler, even bolder. You couldn't wait for that day to come.

t_ch: 浴场角落里，又一次变小的{TEXTJOIN#247}正静静地泡在池水中。一旁的侍者们不时往这边打量，却识趣地没有多说什么。
t_en: In a corner of the baths, a once-again-miniaturized {TEXTJOIN#247} was quietly soaking in the pool. The nearby attendants stole glances, but wisely kept their thoughts to themselves.

t_ch: 它看着你，你看着它，名为沉默的列车在两个干瞪眼的家伙间疾驰而过——作为开拓者，你决定率先打破沉默。
t_en: It stares at you. You stare at it. An Express named Silence races through between two wide-eyed individuals locked in a staring contest. As a Trailblazer, you choose to speak first.

t_ch: 还好吗？
t_en: Are you okay?

t_ch: 嗡。（之前不太好，现在还行。）
t_en: Grumph. (Not great earlier. Better now.)

t_ch: 孩子没事老变小，多半是废了。
t_en: A kid who keeps shrinking probably doesn't have much of a future.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（别骂了，再骂就变得更小了…）
t_en: Grumph... (Stop scolding me. I'll shrink even smaller if you keep going...)

t_ch: 大地兽泡久了会变泥巴兽。
t_en: A dromas that soaks too long will turn into a mud beast.

t_ch: 呜嗡。（才不会啦。）
t_en: Grumph. (No way.)

t_ch: …呜嗡。（…我可能，还没准备好。）
t_en: ...Grumph. (...I might not be ready yet.)

t_ch: 可你是最棒的大地兽。
t_en: But you're the best dromas ever.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（我…真的是吗？）
t_en: Grumph... (Am I... really?)

t_ch: 人无完人。
t_en: No human is perfect.

t_ch: 呜嗡。（不，我压根也不是人啦…）
t_en: Grumph. (Nah, I'm not even human to begin with...)

t_ch: （保持沉默）
t_en: (Remain silent)

t_ch: 呜…（我…最担心的事情还是发生了——搞砸了。）
t_en: *sniff*... (What... I feared most still happened — I messed up.)

t_ch: 呜…（就像{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你看到的那样，我其实没有彻底掌握欧洛尼斯祷言。）
t_en: *sniff* (As you can see, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I haven't really mastered Oronyx's Prayer.)

t_ch: 呜…（大家都把我当成最特别的，我想回应这些期待，但我其实一直都很害怕。）
t_en: *sniff* (Everyone sees me as someone special. I want to meet their expectations, but deep down, I've always been afraid.)

t_ch: 呜呜…（大家会不会对我失望？我会不会配不上超•极•大地兽这个名号？）
t_en: *sniff* (Will they all be disappointed in me? Maybe I'm not worthy of being called the Super Dromas?)

t_ch: 呜…（或许，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也会和我分开……）
t_en: *sniff* (Maybe {F#Mama}{M#Papa} will leave me too...)

t_ch: 孩子——
t_en: Child—

t_ch: 「听我说。」
t_en: "Listen."
Grumph...?

t_ch: 轻松地开导。
t_en: Guide gently.

t_ch: 想什么呢，祷言会失控，八成只是因为你太瘦了，下次培养得全面发展发展。
t_en: What are you thinking? The prayer went out of control, probably just because you're too skinny. Next time, try developing a more balanced build.

t_ch: 而且想成大器不得失败个几百几千次的…支棱起来，我还等着你给我养老呢。
t_en: Besides, if you want to become someone strong, you'll have to fail hundreds or even thousands of times... Chin up. I'm still counting on you to look after me when I'm old.

t_ch: 至于分开？更不用担心，我可是{TEXTJOIN#247}的监护人啊，陪伴孩子长大是我的使命。
t_en: As for being separated? That's nothing to worry about. I'm {TEXTJOIN#247}'s guardian. Watching you grow is my mission.

t_ch: 只要你一直在前进，道路就会不断延伸。所以，不要停止长大啊——
t_en: As long as you keep moving forward, the path will keep stretching ahead. So don't stop growing—

t_ch: 讲点「大道理」
t_en: Drop some "big truths"

t_ch: 放心吧，就算再特别，也没人能要求你必须完美无缺，毕竟就连泰坦神明也做不到。
t_en: Relax. No matter how special you are, nobody gets to demand perfection from anyone. After all, not even the divine Titans could manage that.

t_ch: 举例来说——我住的地方就在某位神搞恶作剧时爆炸过一次。
t_en: Take me, for example. My place literally got blown up once when a certain god pulled a prank.

t_ch: 呜嗡？（啊？啊？）
t_en: Grumph? (Huh? What?)

t_ch: 总之，一两次失败别放在心上，你可是我家的孩子，活得再随心所欲一点吧！
t_en: Anyway, don't let one or two failures get to you. You're my kid, so go ahead and live however you like!

t_ch: 开始胡说八道！
t_en: Start to talk nonsense!

t_ch: 其实在你出生之前，我就确信我家的孩子一定会闯祸，准备了两千万利衡币的赔偿款。
t_en: Even before you were born, I was confident my kid would stir up troubles, so I set aside <unbreak>20</unbreak> million Balance Coins for compensation purposes.

t_ch: 呜嗡？（啊？）
t_en: Grumph? (Huh?)

t_ch: 结果到现在一分都没花掉，一定是我的教育方法出了问题。
t_en: But not a single coin has been used. Clearly, something's off with my parenting style.

t_ch: 呜嗡？（啊？啊？）
t_en: Grumph? (Huh? What?)
...Grumph. (Hmm... yeah.)

t_ch: 呜嗡。呜……（谢谢你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。我想…应该没事了，嗯。）
t_en: Grumph. Grumph... (Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. I think... I'm okay now, hmm.)

t_ch: 呜呜，呜嗡，嗡嗡。（呜诶，酷酷的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}居然讲起道理来了，好诡异哦。）
t_en: Growl, grumph, grumph. (Whoa, seeing my cool {F#Mama}{M#Papa} talk about something serious is kind of weird.)

t_ch: 没事了就好，吃饭去？
t_en: Glad you're feeling better. Want some food?

t_ch: 呜嗡！（好！不过在那之前……）
t_en: Grumph! (Right! But before that...)

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}，你这家伙啊——
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247}, you rascal—

t_ch: 呜嗡！（哇，我错了，不要吃我啦——哈哈……）
t_en: Grumph! (Wah, I'm sorry, please don't eat me — hahaha...)

t_ch: 呜嗡。（嗯…得先回去向大家报个平安才行。）
t_en: Grumph. (Hmm... I should head back and let everyone know I'm safe.)

t_ch: 走吧，我陪你一起。
t_en: Let's go, I'll come with you.

t_ch: 现在修正还来得及，跟我念：规则，就是用来打破的！
t_en: It's not too late to fix this, repeat after me: Rules are made to be broken!

t_ch: 呜嗡（规则，就是用来打破的。）
t_en: Grumph (Rules are made to be broken.)

t_ch: 再大声点！
t_en: Even louder!

t_ch: 呜嗡！（规则，就是用来打破的！）
t_en: Grumph! (Rules are made to be broken!)

t_ch: 很好！现在你还害怕失败吗？
t_en: Great! Now, are you still afraid of failures?

t_ch: 呜嗡…（感觉好像怎么都无所谓了…）
t_en: Grumph... (Feels like nothing matters anymore...)

t_ch: 灰宝，你们回来了！之前的事我都听说…{TEXTJOIN#247}又变小了？怎么会……
t_en: Grayie, you're back! I heard what happened... {TEXTJOIN#247} shrunk again? How did that even...

t_ch: 它吃坏肚子了而已。
t_en: It just has an upset stomach.

t_ch: 没事，已经解决了。
t_en: No problem, it's already been solved.

t_ch: 嗯…好吧，我知道啦。那个，旅团对接人有封信托我交给你们。
t_en: Hmm... alright, I get it. Anyway, the troupe liaison left a letter for you.

t_ch: 呜？（上面写了什么？）
t_en: Huh? (What does it say up there?)

t_ch: 下次一定。
t_en: Next time, I promise.

t_ch: 旅团已经离开了。
t_en: The troupe has already left.

t_ch: 还有机会。
t_en: There's still a chance.

t_ch: 别太责怪自己。
t_en: Don't be too hard on yourself.

t_ch: 没事，聘不到你是他们亏了。
t_en: It's fine. If they didn't hire you, that's their loss.

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡。（不是啦，我是想说——气死，下次能不能免试啊。）
t_en: Grumph, grumph. (No, what I meant was— Ugh, so annoying! Can't we skip the test next time?)

t_ch: 啊！二位回来啦！实在抱歉，刚刚接到个有点赶时间的任务，兽皇已经带着「贝茜摩丝」它们先走了。另外…是发生什么状况了吗？
t_en: Ah! You two are back! I'm so sorry, but I just got an urgent mission and Beast Emperor already left with "Behemoth" and the others. By the way... did something happen?

t_ch: 刚刚我们拯救世界去了。
t_en: We were just out saving the world.

t_ch: 它只是去泡了个澡。
t_en: It just went to take a bath.

t_ch: 原来如此，一定是有事要办吧。我们还担心是不是说错话了……
t_en: I see. You must have had things to do. We were worried we might have said something wrong...

t_ch: 不说这个，我来是想告诉二位，虽然主队出发了，但我们还是想邀请{TEXTJOIN#247}加入。
t_en: Anyway, I came here to tell you both that even though the main team has left, we'd still like to invite {TEXTJOIN#247} to join us.

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}愿不愿意先参加留在城里的「驻屯分团」？虽然资历较浅，但一定能帮它快速熟悉旅团的工作。
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247}, would you like to start out with the city-based "Garrison Regiment"? Though you're a bit green, it'll definitely help you get familiar with the troupe's work quickly.

t_ch: 孩儿，有兴趣吗？
t_en: Hey kid, interested?

t_ch: 是不是还有调查分团？
t_en: Is there also a Survey Corps?

t_ch: 看来阁下提前做过功课了啊——听说大地兽之祖「荒笛」仍在世时，它的追随者们还组成了「宪分团」，史称三大兽团。
t_en: Sounds like someone did their homework. Back when Terravox, the ancestor of the dromases, was still around, its followers formed the Military Police Brigade, one of the three legendary beast groups.

t_ch: 呜嗡！（嗯！去！听起来更好混。）
t_en: Grumph! (Mm hmm! Let's go! Sounds way easier to get by.)

t_ch: 哈哈，虽然我还是听不懂它的话，但这句我倒是理解了。欢迎你！分团的第一次考核任务是在三周后，到时直接来找我们就好。
t_en: Haha, even though I still can't understand what it's saying, I got that part at least. Welcome aboard! The first assessment mission for the Regiment is in three weeks. Just come find us when it's time.

t_ch: 当然，你也可提前熟悉一下氛围。到时候见啦，{NICKNAME}阁下，把{TEXTJOIN#247}放心交给我们吧。
t_en: Of course, you're also welcome to check out the vibe beforehand. See you then, {NICKNAME}. You can leave {TEXTJOIN#247} in our good hands.

t_ch: 咕噜噜噜……（*肚子的叫声*）
t_en: *gurgle*... (*stomach growling*)

t_ch: 宝宝肚肚打雷啦…
t_en: Baby's tummy is making thunder noises...

t_ch: 吃饭去吧？
t_en: Wanna grab some food?

t_ch: 呜嗡！（好耶，我要吃一座山！）
t_en: Grumph! (Yeah! I could eat a whole mountain!)

t_ch: 只要顺利完成任务，并且完成一些考核，就能直接转至主队！也就是实习，怎么样？
t_en: Once you complete the mission and pass a few evaluations, you'll get to join the main team. It's like an internship, what do you think?

t_ch: 旅团实习当日，你对即将出门的小驮兽千叮咛万嘱咐，生怕它到了新的环境被人欺负。
t_en: On the day of the troupe internship, you gave your little pack beast endless reminders, worried it might get bullied in a new environment.

t_ch: 「呜嗡~（没事的，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你知道我的，只有我欺负别人的份。）」
t_en: "Grumph~ (Don't worry, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. You know me. I'm the one who does the bullying.)"

t_ch: …话是这么说，该担心的还是会担心。万一遇上发了疯的泰坦眷属…或者它乱吃野外不干净的土，吃坏了肚子怎么办？
t_en: ...Well then, but you can't help worrying. What if it runs into some crazed Titankin? What if it eats something dirty out in the wild and gets sick?

t_ch: 还是跟过去看看吧。
t_en: Maybe I should go with you to take a look.

t_ch: 没事的，要相信它。
t_en: It'll be fine. Just trust the kid.

t_ch: 没错，它可是你家孩子，一定能轻松地解决问题，在众人面前大放异彩。
t_en: That's right, it's your kid after all. They'll breeze through this problem and shine in front of everyone.

t_ch: 无需担心！但…要是它希望表现给你看的时候，你却不在场，那该有多遗憾啊……
t_en: No need to worry! But... if it wanted to make you proud and you weren't there to see it, wouldn't that be a little sad...?

t_ch: 还是跟过去看看吧。
t_en: Maybe I should go with you to take a look.

t_ch: 这就是几分钟前你的心理活动。其实回想这些没什么意义，因为你人已经在这了。
t_en: That was what went through your mind a few minutes ago. But reminiscences don't matter now. You're already here.

t_ch: 呜嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你真是无处不在。）
t_en: Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, you really are everywhere.)

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡嗡~（谢谢你来看我！这样我更有底气了。）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhh~ (Thank you for visiting me! I feel more confident now.)

t_ch: …多好的孩子啊，你不禁潸然泪下。
t_en: ...What a wonderful child. Your eyes start to well up.

t_ch: 英雄，我们要出发了——再不加快脚步的话，会吃到大地兽的尾气。
t_en: Hero, we need to head off now. If we don't pick up the pace, we'll be eating the dromases' exhaust fumes.

t_ch: 是时候了，就在第一次监护人之旅中见证孩子的成长吧！
t_en: It's the moment to witness your child grow on your first trip as their guardian!

t_ch: 呜嗡——（诶嘿，状态不错，没在{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}面前丢人——真是太遗憾了。）
t_en: Grumph— (Hehe, not bad at all, didn't embarrass myself in front of {F#Mama}{M#Papa} — What a shame.)
Grumph~~~

t_ch: 听不懂啦，大家伙。
t_en: I don't understand you, big guy.

t_ch: 它讲了什么？
t_en: What's it saying?

t_ch: 呜，呜~嗡~~~（它说…我们两个长得简直一模一样。）
t_en: Grumphhhh~~~ (It says... we look exactly alike.)
Grumph~~~

t_ch: 呜，呜~嗡~~~（它还说，老大的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是它的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，让我替它向你问好）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhh~~~ (It also says that boss's {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is its {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, and asked me to say hi to you.)

t_ch: 呜嗡。（好怪哦，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你又多了个孩子呢。）
t_en: Grumph. (That's so weird, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Now you've got another kid.)

t_ch: 你是老大？
t_en: You're the boss?

t_ch: 它眼神不太好吧。
t_en: Its eyesight must be pretty bad.

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡，呜嗡嗡嗡！（它之前还瞧不起我，但现在我已掌握岁月的神力，它就认我做老大啦——我可不止这一个小弟哦！）
t_en: Grumph, grumphhh! (It used to look down on me, but now that I've mastered the divine power of time, it calls me boss. I don't just have one little follower!)

t_ch: 看来，你的孩子在外完全不用担心，再给它些时日，定能掀起腥风血雨…不，成就一番大事业！…嗯？它偷偷干什么呢？
t_en: Looks like there's no need to worry about your child out there. Give it a bit more time, and it might just stir up a savage storm... no, I mean, accomplish something amazing! ...Hm? What is it sneaking around for now?

t_ch: 呜？！呜嗡嗡嗡——（没什么！我们先回家吧！我想多练习一下祷言。你会陪我的对吧，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？）
t_en: Woo!? Grumphhh— (It's nothing! Let's go home! I want to practice my prayers a bit more. You'll stay with me, right, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}?)

t_ch: 最近的{TEXTJOIN#247}十分刻苦，要么是一遍遍地练习祷言，要么就是沉浸在阅读中，有些时候还会突然不知所踪——
t_en: Lately, {TEXTJOIN#247} has been putting in serious effort. It is either repeating its prayers nonstop or completely absorbed in reading. Sometimes it even vanishes without a trace—

t_ch: 看着孩子这么努力学习，作为家长，你心中五味杂陈。
t_en: As a parent, watching your child work so hard fills your heart with a complicated mix of emotions.

t_ch: 是时候进行亲子间的「交流」了，当然，事关孩子的心理健康，必须认真对待才行。你决定斟酌下措辞——
t_en: It's time for a little "heart-to-heart" with your kid. Of course, since it's about its mental well-being, you decide to take it seriously and choose your words carefully—

t_ch: 正经地开场。
t_en: Start seriously.

t_ch: 孩啊，我们来谈谈人生吧。
t_en: Hey kiddo, let's talk about life.

t_ch: 不正经地开场。
t_en: Start casually.

t_ch: 孩啊！这是我一生一次的请求——
t_en: My child! This is my one and only request in life—

t_ch: 呜？（怎么了，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}？啊，是不是{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}最近又闯祸了？好啦好啦，我会替{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}去道歉的啦。）
t_en: Grumph? (What's wrong, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}? Oh, did {F#Mama}{M#Papa} get into trouble again? Alright, alright, I'll go apologize on {F#Mama}{M#Papa}'s behalf.)

t_ch: 直奔主题。
t_en: Cut to the chase.

t_ch: 你最近总在学习，身体会累垮的。打会儿电动好不好…我是说，要不要去泡澡？
t_en: You've been studying non-stop lately. You'll wear yourself out. How about playing some video games... I mean, want to go take a bath?

t_ch: 迂回暗示。
t_en: Drop a hint.

t_ch: 在我像你这么大的时候，根本不知道什么是欧洛尼斯祷言，平常都是在翻垃圾桶。
t_en: When I was your age, I didn't even know what Oronyx's Prayer was. I was too busy rummaging through trash bins.

t_ch: 青出于蓝胜于蓝，你现在的勤奋已经远远超过了{F#娘}{M#爹}，{F#娘}{M#爹}担心你会……
t_en: You've already gone way beyond what your {F#Mama}{M#Papa} ever managed. I'm just a little worried you might push yourself too hard...

t_ch: 呜呜呜。呜嗡——？（再让我学五分钟，就五分钟！等到下次实习结束，一定陪{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}你去玩，好吗？）
t_en: Boohoooo. Grumph—? (Just let me study for five more minutes, just five minutes! Once my next internship is over, I'll definitely take you out for fun, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, okay?)

t_ch: 劝说失败，这孩子绝了——没别的办法，考完再说。
t_en: Convincing it didn't work. This kid's on another level... Guess you'll have to wait until after the exam.

t_ch: 这次的实习也顺利完成了。你看向，它脸上正洋溢着夹杂兴奋和疲惫的光彩。
t_en: The internship wrapped up smoothly. Looking at it, you see its face beaming with a mix of exhilaration and fatigue.

t_ch: 既然顺利结束了…
t_en: Since that's all done...

t_ch: …咱们如约泡澡去？
t_en: ...Shall we head to the bath as planned?
Grumph! (Great—)

t_ch: 浴场，践行时。
t_en: The baths, Action Hour.

t_ch: 呜嗡~（呜嗡~）
t_en: Grumph~ (Grumph~)

t_ch: …你们怎么还不下来？
t_en: ...What's taking you guys so long to come down?

t_ch: 这个池子的人流量…是不是有点超标了？
t_en: Isn't this pool getting a bit... overcrowded?

t_ch: 抱歉，我的粉丝太热情了。
t_en: Sorry, my fans tend to get a little too enthusiastic.

t_ch: 不不不，没有责怪您的意思。我也想体验一下和大地兽一起泡澡是什么感觉，可惜我还在上班。
t_en: No, no, no, I'm not blaming you. Honestly, I'd love to know what it's like to bathe with a dromas too. Too bad I'm still on shift.

t_ch: 人多热闹。
t_en: The more, the merrier.

t_ch: 看得出，客人们都是被{TEXTJOIN#247}吸引过来的。
t_en: No doubt about it. Everyone here was drawn in by {TEXTJOIN#247}.

t_ch: 呜嗡~（铁锅炖大地兽，大家都是配菜。）
t_en: Grumph~ (Iron pot dromas stew with everyone else as side dishes.)

t_ch: 各位客人，彩头讨完了、面也见了，我们还是给英雄一家留些私人空间吧。
t_en: Ladies and gentlemen, we've had our fun and paid our respects. Let's give our heroes some private time with their family.

t_ch: 好吧好吧，下次再一起泡澡哦？{TEXTJOIN#247}。
t_en: Alright, alright, let's take a bath together next time, okay, {TEXTJOIN#247}?

t_ch: 呜嗡……（不要啦，好变态哦……）
t_en: Mmph... (No, stop it, that's creepy...)

t_ch: 终于，你们可以独享这超高温浴池的热度了——就像曾经那两位制造出「浴场惨案」的伙计那样。
t_en: Finally, the scorching bath is all yours, just like the time some two individuals managed to cause the "Baths Incident."

t_ch: 呜嗡——（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我好像知道你在想什么——）
t_en: Grumph— ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I think I know exactly what you're thinking right now—)

t_ch: 嗡。（放弃吧，人类不可能是大地兽的对手的。）
t_en: Grumph. (Give up, humans can't beat dromases.)

t_ch: 可我偏要试试。
t_en: But I'm gonna try anyway.

t_ch: 不要小瞧了我的羁绊啊！
t_en: Don't underestimate the power of my bonds!

t_ch: 人类荣光永存！
t_en: Glory to humanity forever!

t_ch: 一个绝佳的点子在你脑海中成形，它百分之百能让你在泡澡比赛中取胜。可惜这里地方太小，写不下。
t_en: A brilliant idea pops into your head. It would absolutely let you win in the next bath battle. Too bad there's not enough space here to write it down.

t_ch: 你的嘴角勾起一抹笑容，直到<unbreak>2.19</unbreak>秒后，你的脚心命中了水池边的某样东西——那是一个椭圆形的白色固体。
t_en: A smile starts to form at the corner of your mouth. Exactly <unbreak>2.19</unbreak> seconds later, your foot bumps into something by the edge of the pool — a white, oval-shaped solid.

t_ch: 哎呀，滑了一跤。
t_en: Oops, I slipped!

t_ch: 呜呜嗡！（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
t_en: Grumph! ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

t_ch: 人是一切社会关系的总和；未经审视的生活不值得过；世界上没有两片完全相同的树叶；先有鸡后有蛋；两个铁球同时落地……
t_en: Humanity is the sum of all social relations. An unexamined life is not worth living. No two leaves are exactly alike. The chicken came before the egg. Two iron balls fall at the same time...

t_ch: 很好，刚才发生了什么来着？
t_en: Alright, what just happened?

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你没事吧？）
t_en: Grumph, grumph? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, are you okay?)

t_ch: 印象里，你被肥皂滑到，撞进了浴池。可如今你依旧完好地坐在岸上，究竟发生了什么？
t_en: You remember slipping on a bar of soap and falling into the bath. Yet here you are, sitting perfectly fine on the edge. What exactly happened?

t_ch: 一头大地兽，竟然能使用欧洛尼斯祷言回溯肥皂，还顺便把踩了肥皂的{NICKNAME}一并带上岸，恐怕实力早已达到半步祭司境啊。
t_en: A dromas that can use Oronyx's Prayer to rewind soap and rescue {NICKNAME} who slipped on it? It must be approaching the level of a demi-priest already.

t_ch: 嗯，确实令人刮目相看。
t_en: Hmm, I must say, I'm impressed.

t_ch: 桀桀桀，早就跟大哥说过了，此子天赋恐怖如斯，必须为我们所用……
t_en: Hehehe, I told you already, big bro. This kid's talent is terrifying. We need them on our side...

t_ch: 你说话像是小说里的反派。
t_en: You sound like a villain from a novel.

t_ch: 呃…估计是最近被那紫色贼灵纠缠太多次，染上了它的口癖？
t_en: Ugh... maybe I've been around that purple Spirithief too long. I'm starting to talk like them?

t_ch: 去准备最后的测试吧，让我们看看这小家伙能做到何种地步。
t_en: Let's get ready for the final test and see just how far this little one can go.

t_ch: 希望它能向我们证明，大地兽的可能性……
t_en: I hope it can show us what a dromas is truly capable of...

t_ch: 欢迎来到实习转正的最终考核！介绍一下，这位便是我们的团长「兽皇」。今天的考试，由他担任主考官。
t_en: Welcome to the final assessment for your internship promotion! Let me introduce you to the troupe's leader, "Beast Emperor." He'll be serving as your chief examiner today.

t_ch: 那刻夏？
t_en: Anaxa?

t_ch: 你也有隐藏的力量？
t_en: You've got hidden powers too?

t_ch: 好小子，兽皇归来！
t_en: Holy! The return of the emperor!

t_ch: 你怎么还活着？
t_en: How are you still alive?

t_ch: 咳…解释起来很费事。总之，至少今天，请叫我「兽皇」。
t_en: Ahem... It's a long story. Anyway, just for today, please call me "Beast Emperor."

t_ch: 我们特意为{TEXTJOIN#247}准备了旅团迎新餐——看看这些土块的色泽，多么诱人啊。尽管吃吧，小家伙。
t_en: We've prepared a special welcome feast for {TEXTJOIN#247}. Just look at the appetizing color of these dirt clumps. Go ahead and dig in, little one.

t_ch: 你这是石吧？
t_en: That's stones, not soil.

t_ch: 吃石有什么不好？吃啥补啥嘛。一会儿它可是要载大石头的，不来点硬菜没有劲儿。
t_en: What's wrong with eating stones? You are what you eat. It's gonna carry heavy stones later, so it needs something solid to fuel up.

t_ch: 所以，考题是什么？
t_en: So, what's the test?

t_ch: 众所周知，吉奥里亚曾赐予大地兽三项特质——刀枪不入的<color=#dbc291ff>肌质</color>，辨别是非的<color=#dbc291ff>灵知</color>，以及团结众生的<color=#dbc291ff>风采</color>。
t_en: As everyone knows, Georios gave all dromases three gifts — indestructible <color=#dbc291ff>Muscultition</color>, perceptive <color=#dbc291ff>Spiracuity</color>, and uniting <color=#dbc291ff>Charisplendor</color>.

t_ch: 这三项特质是全体大地兽追求的目标，但其中最关键的还是<color=#dbc291ff>肌质</color>。
t_en: These are the ideals that every dromas strives for. Among them, the most vital is <color=#dbc291ff>Muscultition</color>.

t_ch: 看见那边的熔岩块了吗？这场考核的关键就是搬运它。
t_en: See that chunk of condensed lava over there? Moving it is the key to passing this test.

t_ch: 它的表面有接近一千艾的高温——如果这还不够直观，你可以理解为黎明机器的百分之一。
t_en: Its surface reaches nearly a thousand exa in temperature. If that doesn't mean anything to you, just think of it as one percent of the Dawn Device.

t_ch: 怎么还有危险性的？
t_en: Wait, this is dangerous?

t_ch: 咱不测了，干脆回家吧。
t_en: Let's skip the test and go home.

t_ch: 黎明机器真逊。
t_en: The Dawn Device sucks.

t_ch: 难道不该是这块熔岩真的很烫吗？如果感到害怕的话，现在回家还来得及。
t_en: Shouldn't we be more worried about how hot this lava actually is? If you're scared, it's not too late to head back home.

t_ch: 呜嗡~（没事，我应付得来~）
t_en: Grumph~ (No worries, I got this~)

t_ch: 祝你好运，{TEXTJOIN#247}，我们旅团见。
t_en: Good luck, {TEXTJOIN#247}. See you at the troupe.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（哇，好多大地兽。）
t_en: Grumph... (Wow, so many dromases.)

t_ch: 紧张吗？
t_en: Nervous?

t_ch: 呜嗡…（不会啦！毕竟是庆功仪式嘛。）
t_en: Grumph... (No way! It's a celebration ceremony, after all.)

t_ch: 抬头挺胸，这可是荣誉。
t_en: Stand tall and proud. This is an honor.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（我是大地兽，没办法挺胸啦。）
t_en: Grumph... (I'm a dromas. I can't exactly puff out my chest.)

t_ch: 哈哈，不必担心，阁下。看看周围的大地兽们，久违地有新鲜血液加入它们，想必是高兴也来不及，你瞧——
t_en: Haha, no need to worry, my friend. Look at the dromases around us. They're thrilled to have fresh blood joining their ranks after so long. Look—

t_ch: 呜嗡——！
t_en: Grumph—!

t_ch: …什么叫「恭迎老大归位」？
t_en: ...What do you mean "welcome back, boss"?

t_ch: 这下超出预期了。
t_en: Well, that's way beyond what I expected.

t_ch: 别欺负人家啊，{TEXTJOIN#247}。
t_en: Don't bully me, {TEXTJOIN#247}.

t_ch: 你竟然是大地兽之王？
t_en: You're seriously the Dromas King?

t_ch: 呜呜呜嗡。（没有没有，都是朋友，朋友啦。）
t_en: Grumphhhh. (No no, we're all friends here. Just friends.)

t_ch: …「贝茜摩丝」，你怎么哭了？
t_en: ..."Behemoth," why are you crying?

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜嗡嗡…呜嗡嗡嗡！
t_en: Grumph, grumphhh... grumphhhh!

t_ch: 哦，原来是感动的——不提这个了，请{NICKNAME}来为这场仪式开个头吧！
t_en: Oh, turns out you were just moved to tears. Let's not dwell on that. {NICKNAME}, would you kick off this ceremony?

t_ch: 讲点正经的。
t_en: Let's be serious for a moment.

t_ch: 来到奥赫玛后，我结下了许多的缘分。而与{TEXTJOIN#247}的相遇，则是我最珍贵的宝物。
t_en: Since coming to Okhema, I've formed many precious bonds. But meeting {TEXTJOIN#247} has been my most treasured gift of all.

t_ch: 愿你的旅途一切顺利，{TEXTJOIN#247}，记住，有事就回家找{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！
t_en: Have a safe journey, {TEXTJOIN#247}, and remember, if anything happens, come home to {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡！（嘿嘿，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也是我最珍贵的宝物！想锁在柜子里的那种！）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhh! (Hehe, {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is also my most treasured gift! The kind I want to lock up in a cabinet!)

t_ch: 活跃一下气氛。
t_en: Let's liven things up a bit.

t_ch: 其实，这个世界已经毁灭过一次了。是我家孩子挺身而出，击退了万恶的黑潮，然后用祷言回溯了整个世界！很可惜，这事大家都不记得了。
t_en: Matter of fact, this world has already been destroyed once. It was my child who stepped up, fought back against the evil black tide, and then rewound the entire world with a prayer! Unfortunately, no one remembers any of this anymore.

t_ch: 现在，孩子想体验一下普通大地兽的生活，希望旅团不要辜负。
t_en: Now, the kid wants to experience what life is like as an ordinary dromas, so let's just hope the troupe won't be all too disappointing.

t_ch: 嗡，呜嗡！（我认真思考了一下这个设定，果然还是无法接受啊！）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhh! (I gave this version of my birth some serious thought, and nope, still can't accept it!)

t_ch: 尬吹一波。
t_en: Time to hype it up.

t_ch: 最开始，我碰见还是蛋的{TEXTJOIN#247}时，就知道这孩子气运不凡，将来必成一番大业。现在看来，果真如此。
t_en: When I first met {TEXTJOIN#247}, I knew this kid, even still an egg at the time, had extraordinary charisma and was destined for greatness. Now it seems that I was absolutely right.

t_ch: 试想一下，哪怕吉奥里亚打赢了复活赛，它能保证自己学得会欧洛尼斯祷言吗？我家孩子就做到了！
t_en: Think about it: Even if Georios came back to life, could they guarantee they'd master Oronyx's Prayer? Well, my kid did just that!

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}，行；吉奥里亚，不行。
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247}, cool. Georios, not cool.

t_ch: 呜嗡，嗡…（那个，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我想找个地方钻进去了…）
t_en: Grumphhh, Grumph... (Um, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, I kinda wanna crawl into a hole and hide from everyone...)

t_ch: 嘶，讲的太好了，太感人了呜哇啊啊啊啊——
t_en: Phew, that was so well said! I'm getting all emotional, waaaaaah—

t_ch: ——最，最后，有请我们今天的主角，{TEXTJOIN#247}上台呜嗡几句吧！
t_en: —L-lastly, let's welcome our star of the day, {TEXTJOIN#247}, to come up and say a few words!

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡！（其实，我对欧洛尼斯祷言还是蛮有自信的！）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhh! (Actually, I'm pretty confident about my Oronyx's Prayer!)

t_ch: 呜嗡——（有大地兽问我，你怎么连这个都懂？我只好说，我{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}在奥赫玛教过我。）
t_en: Grumph— (A dromas asked me how I knew about this. I could only say that my {F#Mama}{M#Papa} taught me at Okhema.)

t_ch: 呜嗡，呜——呜嗡——（所以，我想说的只有一件事——谢谢你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。这个，请你收下！）
t_en: Grumphhh, Grumph-Grumphhh— (So, there's only one thing I want to say: Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. Here, please take this!)

t_ch: 这是…？
t_en: What's this...?

t_ch: 土块？
t_en: A clump of dirt?

t_ch: 呜嗡——（尝尝看，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，这是我亲手做的礼物。）
t_en: Grumph— (Here, try this, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. It's a gift I made myself.)

t_ch: 岂有不吃的道理！
t_en: How could I refuse to eat this!?

t_ch: 你二话不说，将块状物送入口中，并在{TEXTJOIN#247}的大眼萌攻势下，试着感受那份苦涩中的心意。
t_en: Without a second thought, you pop the chunk into your mouth, and under {TEXTJOIN#247}'s adorable puppy-eyed gaze, try to appreciate the sincerity in its bitterness.

t_ch: 孩啊，心意我领了…
t_en: Kid, I appreciate your kindness...

t_ch: 呜嗡？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，尝尝看嘛？）
t_en: Grumph? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, wanna try some?)

t_ch: 可人类是吃不了土的。
t_en: But humans can't eat dirt.

t_ch: 呜嗡？呜嗡嗡——（这不是普通的土哦？就当是被骗了，咬一口试试嘛——）
t_en: Grumph? Grumphhh— (This isn't just any ordinary dirt. Might as well take it as a scam and have a bite yourself—)

t_ch: 既然都说到这份上——
t_en: Well, since you insist...

t_ch: 你轻轻将「土块」送入嘴里，用牙咬下一小口，试着感受那份苦涩中的心意。
t_en: You gently place the dirt in your mouth, taking a small bite and trying to taste the sincerity in its bitterness.

t_ch: 原来之前你悄咪咪的是在…
t_en: So that's what you were sneakily up to...

t_ch: 呜嗡——（嘿嘿，被发现啦。）
t_en: Grumph— (Hehe, busted.)

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡。（快快，尝尝看。）
t_en: Grumphhh. (Come on, have a try!)

t_ch: 吃掉！
t_en: Eat it up!

t_ch: 你二话不说，将块状物送入口中，并在{TEXTJOIN#247}大眼睛的注视下，试着感受蕴藏在那份苦涩中的心意。
t_en: Without a second thought, you pop the chunk into your mouth, and under {TEXTJOIN#247}'s gaze, try to appreciate the sincerity in its bitterness.

t_ch: 真能吃吗？
t_en: Is it really edible?

t_ch: 呜嗡？呜嗡嗡——（这不是普通的土哦？就当是被骗了，咬一口试试嘛——）
t_en: Grumph? Grumphhh— (This isn't just any ordinary dirt. Might as well take it as a scam and have a bite yourself—)

t_ch: 既然都说到这份上——
t_en: Well, since you insist...

t_ch: 你轻轻将「土块」送入嘴中，用牙咬下一小块，试着感受蕴藏在那份苦涩中的心意。
t_en: You gently place the "dirt" in your mouth, taking a small bite and trying to taste the sincerity in its bitterness.

t_ch: 你感受到了！那份心意是如此甜蜜——呃，好像有点甜过头了。
t_en: You felt it! That was so sweet. Ugh, maybe a bit too sweet.

t_ch: 巧克力啊这是！
t_en: It's chocolate!

t_ch: 好吃！
t_en: Yummy!

t_ch: 呜。呜嗡——（我把它称为「甜土」，嘻嘻。这下{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}也可以算是大地兽啦！）
t_en: Grumph. Grumphhh—(I call it "sweet dirt," hehe. Now {F#Mama}{M#Papa} can be considered a dromas too!)

t_ch: 我们一样了呢~
t_en: We're the same now~

t_ch: 呜嗡~呜嗡嗡！（一样了呢~这样一来，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是我真正的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}啦！）
t_en: Grumph~ Grumphhh! (Exactly! This means {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is my real {F#Mama}{M#Papa} now!)

t_ch: 对，对吗？
t_en: D-Does this make any sense?

t_ch: 呜，呜嗡嗡！（别在意细节啦，总之，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是我真正的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
t_en: Grumph, Grumphhh! (Don't sweat the details. Anyway, {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is my real {F#Mama}{M#Papa} from now on!)

t_ch: 我会不断成长下去，直到成为像{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}那样强大的英雄！
t_en: I'll keep growing stronger until I become a great hero like {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

t_ch: 多年后，一只比山还高的大地兽出现在了奥赫玛。它的阴影遮蔽了黎明机器，脚步让整座圣城都为之震颤。
t_en: Years later, a dromas taller than a mountain appeared in Okhema. Its shadow loomed over the Dawn Device, and its footsteps made the entire holy city tremble.

t_ch: 澎湃的大地之力在它体内奔涌。它走过奥赫玛城外的农田，之后三千个光历年里，那里的粮食亩产达到了一千八……
t_en: The surging power of Earth coursed through its body. After it passed through the farmlands outside Okhema, the crop yield there reached <unbreak>24,100</unbreak> pounds per acre for the next three thousand Light Calendar years...

t_ch: 最终，圣城的公民们做出了决定——让刻法勒下来，它上去顶球。
t_en: Finally, the citizens of the holy city made their decision: Let this dromas take the place of Kephale and prop up the sphere.

t_ch: 于是后人亦称之为，超•极•大地兽……
t_en: And thus, future generations came to call it Super Dromas...

t_ch: 呜嗡？（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，还在发呆吗？我已经收拾好了哦？）
t_en: Grumph? ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, are you still spacing out? I'm all packed up!)

t_ch: 噢！照顾好自己啊！
t_en: Right! Take care of yourself!

t_ch: 哎呀，走神了。一路顺风——
t_en: Oops, got distracted. Have a safe journey—

t_ch: 呜嗡！（嗯，我出发啦！{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
t_en: Grumph! (All set, I'm off, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

t_ch: 看来，这孩子今后的成长已经无须担心了。
t_en: Looks like you don't have to worry about this kid's growth anymore.

t_ch: 不过，还是希望它别造成什么破坏才好。
t_en: Still, you hope it won't cause any trouble.

t_ch: 呜。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
t_en: Grumph... ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

t_ch: 噢，{TEXTJOIN#247}，我的{TEXTJOIN#247}——
t_en: Oh, {TEXTJOIN#247}, my {TEXTJOIN#247}——

t_ch: 呜…嗡嗡……（感觉上次见面过去还没多久…算啦。）
t_en: Grumph... Grumphhhh... (Feels like it wasn't that long since we last met... never mind.)

t_ch: 旅团放假了吗？
t_en: Is the troupe on vacation these days?

t_ch: 呜嗡嗡——（嗯，差不多，有事想拜托{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}。）
t_en: Grumphhhh— (Hmm, close enough. I wanna ask {F#Mama}{M#Papa} for something.)

t_ch: 呜~嗡？（我在想，要是让一些属性登峰造极，我会变成什么样子呢？）
t_en: Hmm~? (I wonder what I'd become if some of my stats were maxed out?)

t_ch: 懂了，培养系统，启动！
t_en: Got it. Build system, activate!

t_ch: 交给{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}啦！
t_en: Leave it to {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!

t_ch: 它不在这里，或许在你们之前留下过回忆的地方。去浴场看看吧。
t_en: It's not here. Maybe it's somewhere you made memories together before. Try checking the bath.

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}似乎有话想对你说，先去和它聊聊吧！
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247} seems to have something to tell you. Go have a chat with it!

t_ch: 准备好了吗？我们开始测验吧。
t_en: Ready? Let's begin the test.

t_ch: 来吧。
t_en: Come on then.

t_ch: 稍等，还有点事。
t_en: Hold on, I have other matters to attend to.

t_ch: 呜嗡~（我感觉充满了力量——放马过来吧。）
t_en: Grumphhh~ (I feel myself filled with powerl. Bring it on!)

t_ch: 不知不觉间，{TEXTJOIN#247}已经成长到这般地步了呢。
t_en: Before I knew it, {TEXTJOIN#247} has grown so much.

t_ch: 呜嗡…（我一定可以的，我一定可以的……）
t_en: Grumphh... (I can do this. I can do this...)

t_ch: 这种级别的考试，对{TEXTJOIN#247}来说不成问题。赶紧开始吧。
t_en: An exam of this level is no problem for {TEXTJOIN#247}. Let's get started.

t_ch: 来啦。
t_en: Here I come!

t_ch: 稍等一下。
t_en: Just a minute.

t_ch: 这只幼兽究竟能做到什么程度呢？连我也久违地期待起来了……
t_en: Just how far can this young dromas go? Strangely enough, even I'm getting so excited about this...

t_ch: 呜，呜？呜嗡。（{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，我紧张吗？好像没有？算了，还是早点考完回家吃土吧。）
t_en: Grumph, Grumph? Grumph. ({F#Mama}{M#Papa}, am I nervous? No? Whatever, let's just get this exam over with and go home to eat some soil.)

t_ch: 没想到我能亲眼见证伟大小大地兽的诞生…赞美吉奥里亚，赞美大地啊！
t_en: I can't believe I got to witness the birth of the great little dromas with my own eyes... Praise be to Georios, praise be to Earth!

t_ch: {TEXTJOIN#247}还等着呢，别犹豫了，开始测验吧。
t_en: {TEXTJOIN#247} still is waiting. So don't waste more time, let's start the test.

t_ch: 来吧！
t_en: Let's do this!

t_ch: 再等我一下…
t_en: I need a minute...

t_ch: 某日 和平的奥赫玛
t_en: Just another day in peaceful Okhema

t_ch: 呀，灰宝，你来了！准备好参加这次的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」了嘛？
t_en: Ah, Grayie, you're here! Are you ready for the Chimera World Tournament?

t_ch: 以小灰的实力，肯定能取得很高的名次吧。哼哼，但缇宝老师也不是好惹的哦。
t_en: With Little Gray's abilities, they'll surely get a high ranking. Hehe, but Lady Tribbie isn't someone to be messed with either.

t_ch: 等等，先给我解释下…
t_en: Hold on, explanation please?

t_ch: 灰宝应该很熟悉小奇美拉了吧。在翁法罗斯，很早就有安排奇美拉进行对战的传统，而它们的指挥者，也被称为<color=#dbc291ff>奇美拉训练家。</color>
t_en: Grayie, you must be quite familiar with Little Chimera by now. In Amphoreus, there's a long-standing tradition of arranging battles for chimeras, and those who command them are known as <color=#dbc291ff>Chimera Trainers.</color>

t_ch: 这场世界锦标赛，就是奇美拉训练家互相较量的赛事啦。
t_en: This world tournament is where chimera trainers compete against each other.

t_ch: 虽说是竞赛，但不会有任何奇美拉受到伤害。小灰放心，大家都有分寸的！
t_en: Although it's a competition, no chimeras will be harmed. Don't worry, Little Gray. Everyone knows their boundaries!

t_ch: 好啊，奇美拉工作不饱和是吧。
t_en: Oh, so the chimera's not getting enough work, huh?

t_ch: 只工作，不玩耍，再聪明的奇美拉也会变傻。灰宝就稍微给它们放个长假吧。
t_en: All work and no play makes even the smartest chimera dull. Grayie, why don't you give them a nice long break?

t_ch: 对战也是工作的一部分，小灰按「团建」来理解就好！
t_en: Combat is part of their job too, Little Gray. Just think of it as team building!

t_ch: 不战斗就无法生存！
t_en: They have to fight to survive!

t_ch: 这种团建不要啊…
t_en: Not this kind of team building...

t_ch: 生命花园所有的小奇美拉都会参加这次锦标赛，灰宝能见到不少熟悉的面孔哦。
t_en: All the Little Chimeras from the Garden of Life will participate in this tournament. You'll get to see many familiar faces there, Grayie.

t_ch: 我该怎么参赛呢？
t_en: How do I enter the tournament?

t_ch: 别担心，大家早就替灰宝安排好啦。
t_en: Don't worry, we've already made arrangements for you, Grayie.

t_ch: 咳，敲黑板！现在由缇宝老师来为小灰做说明，要认真听讲哦。
t_en: Ahem, attention class! Lady Tribbie will now explain everything to you, so pay close attention!

t_ch: 「奇美拉世界锦标赛」，就是由训练家带着自己的奇美拉相互对战的赛事。本届锦标赛共有十三位参赛选手，加上小灰作为特邀嘉宾，就是十四个！
t_en: The Chimera World Tournament is a tournament where trainers compete against each other with their chimeras. There is a total of thirteen contestants, and with Little Gray joining as a special guest, that makes fourteen!

t_ch: 十三位…好熟悉的数字。
t_en: Thirteen... that number rings a bell.

t_ch: 预言中的奇美拉训练家是吧？
t_en: So you're the prophesied chimera trainer, huh?

t_ch: 我和缇宝老师也会参加，都是灰宝熟悉的伙伴，所以别紧张，就当是场和大家的游戏吧。
t_en: Lady Tribbie and I will be there too. We're all your friends, Grayie, so don't be nervous. Just think of it as a game with everyone.

t_ch: 然后呢，考虑到小灰没有自己的奇美拉，经讨论后决定——
t_en: Also, considering you don't have your own chimera, we discussed and decided...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>小灰可以使用任何选手的阵容参赛，完全自由哦。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Little Gray can use any player's lineup to compete. In other words, you have complete freedom!</color>

t_ch: 请选择你的英雄！
t_en: Select your hero!

t_ch: 免费使用是好文明。
t_en: To give freely is to show true courtesy.

t_ch: 更复杂的赛事规则，就在实战中做讲解好啦。缇宝老师，我们现在就开始吧。
t_en: I'll explain the more complex rules during actual matches. Lady Tribbie, let's begin now.

t_ch: 好哦。小灰，和*我们*一起，成为奇美拉训练家吧！
t_en: All right! Little Gray, join us and become a chimera trainer!

t_ch: 去吧！奇美拉！
t_en: Go, chimera!

t_ch: 事情呀，要从上届「奇美拉世界锦标赛」的决赛说起……
t_en: Well, it all started at the finals of the last "Chimera World Tournament"...

t_ch: 那可是场全奥赫玛瞩目的焦点战，我也在现场观赛。最终，凯撒大人以微弱的优势获胜。
t_en: It was a match that had all of Okhema watching, and I was there to witness it. In the end, the Great Imperator won by a narrow margin.

t_ch: 小凯撒，耍赖皮！那个能力也太无敌啦！不过，听了这么多，小灰应该快明白了吧？
t_en: Little Imperator, that's so unfair! That ability is way too overpowered! But hey, after hearing all this, Little Gray must be getting it now, right?

t_ch: 经过数回合的鏖战，缇宝的奇美拉小队最终败下阵来…
t_en: After several grueling rounds of battle, Tribbie's chimera squad was finally defeated...

t_ch: 这么快就学会了对战规则，灰宝果然很有天赋呢。
t_en: You've learned the battle rules so quickly, Grayie. You really are talented!

t_ch: 哼哼，缇宝老师教得也很棒！不过，刚才只是教学局，真正的比赛现在才要开始。
t_en: Hehe, Lady Tribbie did a great job too! But that was just the tutorial. The real match is about to begin.

t_ch: 我看了刚才的对战。不错，你确实是个强劲的对手。
t_en: I watched your recent battle. Not bad, you're indeed a formidable opponent.

t_ch: HKS！
t_en: HKS!

t_ch: 说过很多遍，别乱用这个词。
t_en: I've told you many times, don't throw that word around carelessly.

t_ch: 也是有样学样了。
t_en: Just following your lead.

t_ch: 绝对是你平时说了太多次吧！
t_en: You must've said it way too many times!

t_ch: 这就是小敌专属的奇美拉，不仅打架很厉害，在悬锋古语方面也相当有造诣呢。
t_en: This is De's personal chimera. Not only is it fierce in combat, but it's also quite accomplished in the ancient Kremnos language.

t_ch: 小车厘比斯也能帮我照顾病人，学起知识来可快啦。
t_en: Krenabis can also help me take care of patients, and they're such quick learners!

t_ch: 嗷呜。我还可以帮小风堇团结队伍成员，获得比赛胜利！
t_en: Awoo! I can also help Cinny unite the team members and secure victory in the match!

t_ch: 所以，专属奇美拉是…
t_en: So, a personal chimera is...

t_ch: 是每位训练家培训出的、很特别的奇美拉，在外观上就非常地有辨识度！
t_en: It's a very special chimera trained by each trainer, with a highly distinctive appearance!

t_ch: 这种「相似」现象至今都没得到合适的解释，只能说…瑟希斯的祝福，很神奇吧？
t_en: This "similarity" phenomenon still hasn't found a proper explanation. Let's just say... the Blessing of Cerces is quite mysterious, isn't it?

t_ch: 小伊卡要失业了吗？
t_en: Is Little Ica going to lose their job?

t_ch: 灰宝想什么呢。小伊卡可是大天马，是天空的孩子，和小奇美拉不是竞争关系啦。
t_en: What are you thinking, Grayie? Little Ica is a mighty winged horse, a child of the sky. There's no competition between her and Little Chimera.

t_ch: *我们*的苹果糖也很可爱！小灰已经见到过啦。
t_en: Our Candied Apple is super cute too! Little Gray has already seen them!

t_ch: 就没有我专属的奇美拉吗？
t_en: Don't I get my own chimera?

t_ch: 嗯…或许，灰宝在花园的树下多许几次愿望，属于你的小奇美拉就会掉下来呢？
t_en: Hmm... Maybe if you make a few more wishes under the garden tree, your little chimera will fall right down from it?

t_ch: 开个玩笑啦。这些小家伙是瑟希斯的恩赐，等你们磨合的时间更长些，说不定它就会自动出现在你面前。
t_en: Just kidding! These little ones are Cerces's blessing. Once you spend more time bonding with them, they might just show up in front of you on their own.

t_ch: 等不及要进行对战了！
t_en: I can't wait to battle!

t_ch: 哼，那就堂堂正正地来挑战我吧。
t_en: Hmph, then come challenge me fair and square.

t_ch: 参赛选手快到齐，锦标赛就要开始了。小灰，下次见面，就是对手了哦！
t_en: The contestants are almost all here, and the tournament's about to begin. The next time we meet, we'll be rivals, Little Gray!

t_ch: 走吧。赛事报名点就在不远处，我来带灰宝过去。
t_en: Let's go. The registration point is not far from here. I'll take Grayie there.

t_ch: 嗷呜！欢迎！我最喜欢的特邀嘉宾来了，做好参赛准备了吗？
t_en: Awoo! Welcome! My favorite special guest has arrived. Are you ready to compete?

t_ch: 开始奇美拉对战！
t_en: Time for a chimera battle!

t_ch: 鉴于你是初次参赛，我们特意安排了数场相对轻松的比赛，来帮助你熟悉对战规则，并确定你的初始等级。
t_en: Since this is your first time competing, we've specially arranged several relatively easy matches to help you get familiar with the battle rules and determine your initial rank.

t_ch: 定级赛是吧？这个我熟。
t_en: Placement matches, huh? I'm familiar with that.

t_ch: 我无法从这个段位降级。
t_en: I can't be demoted from this rank.

t_ch: 嗷呜！「奇美拉世界锦标赛」即将开始！这次，你会采取什么策略呢？
t_en: Awoo! The Chimera World Tournament is about to begin! What strategy are you going to use this time?

t_ch: 我想和你聊聊…
t_en: Can we talk...?

t_ch: 嗷呜。天气这么好，正适合来场无拘无束的谈话。想和我聊点什么？
t_en: Awoo. Such lovely weather, perfect for a laid-back chat. What's on your mind?

t_ch: 为什么你不用工作？
t_en: Why don't you have to work?

t_ch: 开幕雷击嗷呜！现在的年轻人说话都这么直接的吗？
t_en: A heavy hit right off the bat, awoo! Are all young people these days so straightforward?

t_ch: 咳…要知道，主持比赛可是份力气活，和砸盾牌那些的比起来也不算轻松，尤其是暂停时要不停圆场，超辛苦的嗷呜。
t_en: *cough* Y'know, hosting a match really takes a lot of effort. Compared to smashing shields and all that, it's not exactly easy either... Especially during pauses, when I have to keep the crowd warm the entire time. It's super exhausting, awoo.

t_ch: 不是每只奇美拉都能坐上这张解说台的，这是我奋斗得来的结果！
t_en: Not every chimera gets to sit at this commentator's desk... I worked my tail off to get here!

t_ch: 你旁边的同事怎么不说话？
t_en: Why isn't your coworker next to you saying anything?

t_ch: 嗷呜。是有些原因的，嗷…还是让它自己给你解释吧。
t_en: Awoo. There's a reason for this, awoo... I'll let it explain itself.

t_ch: 因为我说的话总是反向验证，久而久之，官方就不让我发言了嗷呜。
t_en: Since everything I say ends up being proven wrong, they eventually banned me from making any official statements, awoo.

t_ch: 说几句给我听听？
t_en: Say something for me, will you?

t_ch: 「这局我觉得你能赢！」「奇美拉骑脸怎么输」「这总翻不了吧？」
t_en: "I think you've got this one!" "Can't lose with a chimera in your face!" "No way they're coming back from this!"

t_ch: 大概…就是这种解说词，然后场面就急转直下了。我也不懂嗷呜。
t_en: That's pretty much how the commentary went, and then everything went downhill from there. Don't ask me why though, awoo.

t_ch: 谢谢，你还是别说话了。
t_en: Thanks, but please just stop talking.

t_ch: 你还能坐在这也挺厉害的。
t_en: Pretty impressive that you can still sit here.

t_ch: 就是这样嗷呜。哎，和这种同事合作主持，我也是压力超大！
t_en: And that's that, awoo! *sigh* Working with a co-host like this really stresses me out!

t_ch: 还没准备好…
t_en: I'm not ready yet...

t_ch: 嗷呜。时间不等奇美拉，但对你，我有着无限的耐心。准备好后再来吧！
t_en: Awoo. Time waits for no chimera, but for you, I have infinite patience. Come back when you're ready!

t_ch: 没什么想聊的了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 鼓掌！灰宝做得好棒。怎么样，现在应该完全掌握奇美拉对战的诀窍了吧？
t_en: Applause! Well done, Grayie. So, have you completely mastered the tricks of chimera battles now?

t_ch: 闹剧结束了，来点高难度的！
t_en: Playtime's over. Let's kick it up a notch!

t_ch: 别说大话哦。大家只是在陪小灰练习呢，还没拿出真本事来！
t_en: Don't get too cocky! Everyone's just helping you to practice, Little Gray. We haven't even shown our true skills yet!

t_ch: 感觉不如奇美拉上班…
t_en: Feels worse off than watching chimera work...

t_ch: 唔，禁止拉踩！奇美拉在工作之余的生活也很丰富的，小灰要多来体验。
t_en: Hmm, no throwing shade! Chimeras have got a pretty rich life outside of work too. You should come experience it more often, Little Gray.

t_ch: 好啦，既然灰宝都学会了，我和缇宝老师的任务也要结束了。往后，就在赛场上相见吧！
t_en: All right, now that Grayie has learned everything, Tribbie's and my mission is complete. Let's meet again on the battlefield!

t_ch: 要继续加油哦。哼哼，就以追上*我们*的脚步为目标吧。
t_en: Keep up the good work! Hehe, just set your goal to catch up with us.

t_ch: 别说了，我有自己的节奏。
t_en: Save it. I've got my own rhythm.

t_ch: 我要成为奇美拉联盟冠军！
t_en: I will become the Chimera League Champion!

t_ch: 嗷呜！不愧是我们的特邀嘉宾，说话就是硬气。我很看好你哦。
t_en: Wowza! As expected from our special guest, you've got some real guts! I've got high hopes for you.

t_ch: 但其余选手也都在认真准备，可别掉以轻心了嗷呜——
t_en: But the other contestants are preparing seriously too, so don't let your guard down, awoo—

t_ch: 环顾四周，伙伴们的欢笑与奇美拉此起彼伏的嗷呜叫唤，似和煦阳光般包裹着这座花园。
t_en: Looking around, the laughter of companions and the echoing howls of chimeras wrapped the garden in warmth, like gentle sunshine.

t_ch: 努努斯，快对它使用魔术技巧。
t_en: Nanus, quick, use your magic on it.

t_ch: 嗷呜嗷呜地说什么呢？不服气的话，跟我的猫咪神偷说去喵！
t_en: What's with all that awoo-ing? If you've got a problem with it, take it up with my Master Cat-Thief, fudge!

t_ch: 蝶糕糕，肚子饿了吗？乖，稍等就给你做点好吃的。
t_en: Butterfly Cake, are you hungry? Be good now, and I'll make you something yummy in a bit.

t_ch: 今日的奥赫玛，依旧很和平呢。
t_en: Okhema is as peaceful as ever today.

t_ch: 好吧，你忽然觉得，吵吵闹闹的奥赫玛也挺不错的，不是吗？
t_en: Well, you suddenly realize that the noisy, bustling Okhema isn't so bad after all, is it?
